fields.value: Enterprise teams need a low-friction path to discover, evaluate, and deploy third-party AI agents with standardized interoperability and procurement.

evidence.quote: Google Cloud just made it possible to shop for AI agents the same way you ask a question — in plain English.

The new AI Agent Marketplace, integrated directly into Google Cloud Marketplace, lets enterprise teams discover, evaluate, and deploy third-party agents built on the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol using Gemini-powered natural language search.
The AI Agent Marketplace sits inside Google Cloud Marketplace, which already processes billions in annual cloud software transactions.

For enterprise teams evaluating agent procurement strategy, the practical recommendation is straightforward: if you are already on Google Cloud, the Agent Marketplace is now the lowest-friction path to deploying third-party agents.

evidence.quote: HappyRobot and Kuehne+Nagel have entered a strategic partnership to deploy AI workers across Kuehne+Nagel's global Air Logistics division.

The partnership launched in Kuehne+Nagel's Healthcare HyperCare control tower, a specialized team responsible for round-the-clock monitoring of temperature-controlled shipments. AI workers were deployed within weeks, handling outbound carrier communications, exception escalation, and multilingual coordination across English, French, German, Spanish, and Mandarin overnight and across global time zones.
The pilot results prompted greenlight approval for broader rollout across global Air operations, with more than ten identified use cases on the roadmap

claims.subject: Google Cloud
claims.object: enrichment agent that crawls BigQuery datasets and creates an OKF document for each table

claims.subject: Google Cloud
claims.object: Knowledge Catalog updated to ingest OKF

evidence.quote: Google Cloud is introducing the Open Knowledge Format (OKF), a new spec that standardizes knowledge as Markdown files and makes it portable across systems.

Alongside the spec, Google Cloud is shipping several reference implementations. There's an enrichment agent that crawls BigQuery datasets and creates an OKF document for each table, a static HTML visualizer, and three sample bundles for GA4 e-commerce , Stack Overflow, and Bitcoin datasets .
Google Cloud also updated its Knowledge Catalog so it can ingest OKF and serve it to agents.

evidence.quote: AI.cc, the Singapore-based unified AI API aggregation platform, today released its 2026 AI API Infrastructure Report, the most comprehensive analysis of enterprise AI API usage patterns, cost benchmarks, and model adoption trends published to date.

The release of DeepSeek V4-Flash at $0.14 per million input tokens and $0.28 per million output tokens on April 24, 2026 -- following DeepSeek V3.2's earlier disruption at $0.28 per million input tokens -- established a new price floor for frontier-adjacent AI capability that forced a broad repricing across the model ecosystem.
Average models per enterprise account reached 4.7 in Q1 2026, up from 2.1 in Q1 2025 -- a 124% increase in the diversity of models actively called per organization within a single year.
